define.name: FLASH_ATTR_ERASED_IS_ONE
define.brief: Defines one as the erased bit state.

define.name: FLASH_ATTR_MEMORY_MAPPED
define.brief: The memory is accessible in a memory mapped mode.

define.name: FLASH_ATTR_REWRITABLE
define.brief: Programmed pages can be programmed again.
define.note: This is incompatible and alternative to @p FLASH_ATTR_ECC_CAPABLE.

define.name: FLASH_ATTR_ECC_CAPABLE
define.brief: The memory is protected by an ECC mechanism.
define.note: This usually puts restrictions on the program operations. - Program operations can only happen at offsets aligned to write page boundaries. - The programmed data size must be a multiple of the write page size. - Programmed pages cannot be re-programmed.

define.name: FLASH_ATTR_ECC_ZERO_LINE_CAPABLE
define.brief: The device is able to overwrite zero to a line.
define.note: This attribute is only meaningful for ECC-capable devices.

define.name: FLASH_ATTR_SUSPEND_ERASE_CAPABLE
define.brief: The device is able to suspend erase operations.

define.name: FLASH_ATTR_SPI_4BYTES_ADDR_HINT
define.brief: Hint to use 4 bytes addresses in SPI protocol.

typedef.name: flash_sector_descriptor_t
typedef.brief: Type of a flash sector descriptor.

typedef.name: flash_descriptor_t
typedef.brief: Type of a flash device descriptor.

field.name: sectors_count
field.brief: Number of sectors in the device.

field.name: sectors
field.brief: Sector descriptors for non-uniform devices or @p NULL.

field.name: sectors_size
field.brief: Uniform sector size or zero for non-uniform devices.

field.name: address
field.brief: Mapped base address or @p NULL if not memory mapped.

method.name: flsRead
method.param: Number of bytes to be read.
method.retval: If there is no erase operation in progress.
If there is an erase operation in progress.
If the read operation failed.
If access to the memory failed.

method.name: flsProgram
method.param: Number of bytes to be programmed.
method.retval: If there is no erase operation in progress.
If there is an erase operation in progress.
If the program operation failed.
If access to the memory failed.

method.name: flsStartEraseAll
method.retval: If there is no erase operation in progress.
If there is an erase operation in progress.
If access to the memory failed.

method.name: flsStartEraseSector
method.retval: If there is no erase operation in progress.
If there is an erase operation in progress.
If access to the memory failed.

method.name: flsQueryErase
method.brief: Queries the driver for erase operation progress.
method.param: Recommended time, in milliseconds, before retrying, can be @p NULL.
method.retval: If there is no erase operation in progress.
If there is an erase operation in progress.
If the erase operation failed.
If access to the memory failed.

method.name: flsVerifyErase
method.brief: Returns the erase state of a sector.
method.retval: If the sector is erased.
If there is an erase operation in progress.
If the verify operation failed.
If access to the memory failed.

method.name: flsAcquireExclusive
method.retval: If the access is obtained.
If exclusive access is not implemented.

method.name: flsReleaseExclusive
method.retval: If the access is released.
If exclusive access is not implemented.
